events.title: Wairarapa Wine Brunch
events.description: A leisurely Sunday brunch paired with a curated selection of Wairarapa's finest wines. Perfect for a relaxed long lunch with friends and family.

events.title: Live Music Night
events.description: Join us for a special evening of live acoustic music, local wines, and delicious food. The perfect way to kick off your weekend in Martinborough.

events.title: Trivia & Tap Night
events.description: Test your knowledge and enjoy cold beers on tap at our monthly trivia night. Teams of up to 6 welcome — prizes for the winners!
